gist.headline: Ciel AI joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Ciel AI just landed in the community showcase! It's a slick, mobile-first AI assistant powered entirely by our infrastructure.
gist.summary: Added Ciel AI, a mobile-first AI assistant powered entirely by Pollinations, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Developers and users can now discover Ciel AI in the greenhouse to see a full-featured mobile integration of our API in action.
gist.visual_concept: Ciel AI is a mobile-first assistant. Visuals should include a cute retro mobile phone or smartphone displaying a chat interface. The pollinations bee (Polly) interacting with the phone, maybe holding it or flying next to it. The setting is a cozy greenhouse with code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny scarf, hovering next to a chunky retro mobile phone displaying a chat interface. The phone is resting in a lush digital greenhouse where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny scarf, hovering next to a chunky retro mobile phone displaying a chat interface. The phone is resting in a lush digital greenhouse where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
